v: [2:8] And the LORD God planted a garden eastward in Eden; and there he put the man whom he had formed. [2:13] And the name of the second river is Gihon: the same is it that compasseth the whole land of Ethiopia. [19:11] But if any man hate his neighbour, and lie in wait for him, and rise up against him, and smite him mortally that he die, and fleeth into one of these cities: 19:12 Then the elders of his city shall send and fetch him thence, and deliver him into the hand of the avenger of blood, that he may die. ⭐[19:13] Thine eye shall not pity him, but thou shalt put away the guilt of innocent blood from Israel, that it may go well with thee.
